dashboard.label: Armis Collectors Product Listing and Aging View

search.query: | inputlookup armis_collectors_fixed.csv | stats count as total_collectors

| inputlookup armis_collectors_fixed.csv | eval creation_epoch=strptime('Creation Date (GMT -4)',"%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S") | stats min(creation_epoch) as oldest_epoch | eval oldest=strftime(oldest_epoch,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")

| inputlookup armis_collectors_fixed.csv | eval creation_epoch=strptime('Creation Date (GMT -4)',"%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S") | stats max(creation_epoch) as newest_epoch | eval newest=strftime(newest_epoch,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")

| inputlookup armis_collectors_fixed.csv | eval ntp_count=mvcount(split('NTP Servers',",")) | eval only_cloudflare=if(ntp_count=1 AND 'NTP Servers'="time.cloudflare.com",1,0) | stats count(eval(ntp_count=1)) as single_ntp_collectors sum(only_cloudflare) as cloudflare_only_collectors
| inputlookup armis_collectors_fixed.csv | stats count by Status | sort - count

| inputlookup armis_collectors_fixed.csv | eval creation_epoch=strptime('Creation Date (GMT -4)',"%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S") | eval age_seconds = now() - creation_epoch
| eval years = floor(age_seconds/31536000) | eval rem_after_years = age_seconds - (years*31536000)
| eval months = floor(rem_after_years/2592000) | eval rem_after_months = rem_after_years - (months*2592000)
| eval weeks = floor(rem_after_months/604800) | eval rem_after_weeks = rem_after_months - (weeks*604800)
| eval days = floor(rem_after_weeks/86400) | eval rem_after_days = rem_after_weeks - (days*86400)
| eval hours = floor(rem_after_days/3600) | eval minutes = floor((rem_after_days - (hours*3600))/60)
| eval Age = years . " years, " . months . " months, " . weeks . " weeks, " . days . " days, " . lpad(hours,2,"0") . ":" . lpad(minutes,2,"0")
| table "Collector ID", "Creation Date (GMT -4)", Age, "Last Seen (GMT -4)", "System Vendor", "Product Serial", "Name", "MAC Address", "IP Address", "Default Gateway", "Subnet", "NTP Servers", Status
| sort - creation_epoch
